Refresh trạng thái dự án
Mở thư viện prompt

label: i
title: Trạng thái bộ não
Xuất chat Markdown
Đổi sáng/tối
Xóa nội dung chat hiện tại
Nhảy lên câu hỏi/câu trả lời trước
Nhảy xuống câu hỏi/câu trả lời tiếp theo
Nhảy xuống cuối chat

label: Analyze PLR
data_prompt: Analyze PLR File / Folder: Read this PLR/source note like a license-aware product strategist. Output: summary, niche, useful parts, parts to remove, license/risk level, rebrand recommendation, asset gaps, product kit angle, and final USE / USE ONLY AS RESEARCH / SKIP decision. Source or folder note: [paste here]

label: Idea Score
data_prompt: Product Idea Scoring: Score this idea for Demand, Buyer Pain, AI Replace Risk, Workflow Value, WarriorPlus Fit, Rebrand Potential, Backend Potential, SaaS Potential, Risk, and final decision NEN LAM / CHUA NEN LAM / BO QUA. Also explain what must be added so it is not raw AI content. Idea: [paste idea here]

label: Upgrade Kit
data_prompt: Upgrade Raw Content Into Product Kit: Convert this raw AI/PLR content into a sellable implementation kit. Include workflow, use cases, examples, checklist, customization prompts, planner/sheet, compliance note, file structure, pricing, bump/OTO, and why buyers pay instead of asking AI. Content: [paste here]

label: Product Assets
data_prompt: Create Product Assets: Build a file-by-file product package. Output exact filenames, purpose, required contents, examples to include, quality checks, and build order. Product: [product name]

label: Full Launch Pack
data_prompt: /full_launch_pack AI Email Campaign Kit

label: Offer Angle
data_prompt: Build Offer Angle: Turn this idea into a clear offer. Output buyer, pain, safe promise, mechanism, unique angle, deliverables, proof substitutes, and why AI alone is not enough. Product: [product name]

label: Sales Page
data_prompt: Write Sales Page: Write a complete WarriorPlus-friendly sales page with headline, subheadline, problem, why raw AI/PLR is not enough, solution, what is inside, how it works, bonuses, who it is for/not for, price framing, FAQ, compliance-safe risk reversal, CTA, and the objection 'Can I just ask AI?'. Product: [product name]

label: Funnel Plan
data_prompt: Create Funnel Plan: Build FE, order bump, OTO1, OTO2, downsell, recurring/backend if useful, commission plan, launch checklist, and explain why each upsell sells speed/depth/license instead of more raw AI text. Product: [product name]

label: W+ Listing
data_prompt: Build WarriorPlus Listing: Create Product Title, Short Description, Long Description, Category, Tags, Price, Commission, Refund Policy, Vendor Note, Affiliate Approval Note, Delivery Page Text, and Support Note. Product: [product name]

label: Swipe Pack
data_prompt: Create Affiliate Swipe Pack: Create 3 email swipes, 3 short promo emails, 5 Facebook posts, 5 X posts, 3 subject-line sets, 1 launch announcement, 1 last chance email, and 10 affiliate bonus ideas. Product: [product name]

label: 1. Kiểm tra kho

label: Chuyên sâu
title: Chạy agent ngách ở chế độ chuyên sâu
data_prompt: /ai_print_deep AI-assisted PLR products + KDP covers + coloring book + journal + poster/social media assets. Hãy chọn ngách ngon nhất, tạo productized pack, FE/bump/OTO, file tree, 7-day build plan. Offer seeds: AI Etsy Printable Bundle Builder, AI Kids Worksheet Factory, AI KDP Puzzle Book Launch Kit, AI Coloring Page Niche Pack, AI Journal Interior System, AI Canva Printable Product Kit.
